title: jasminum simplicifolium subsp. leratii
intro: Jasminum simplicifolium subsp. leratii, commonly known as the Cape jasmine or Star jasmine, is a flowering plant species within the family Oleaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum simplicifolium subsp. leratii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and flowers are used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
